generatedFrom: tools/out/sheets/*-chars.png contact sheets (visually inspected) + per-cell zooms

entries.who: Skeletal knight in pale ice-blue/white plate armor; bone-white skull face with dark sockets under a horned/finned helm; heavy pauldrons, plate skirt, brown boots. Reads as a frost/bone death-knight.
entries.mobIdea: Frostbone Knight — armored melee undead, slow heavy swing, applies chill/slow

entries.who: Bulkier death knight: dark steel-grey spiked helm with horns, teal-white bone-plate cuirass and huge pauldrons, gold/tan belt, brown boots. Row 3 (up) shows a wide white/grey cape.
entries.mobIdea: Grave Champion — elite armored undead miniboss, cleave + shield-wall

entries.who: Figure in solid red/scarlet plate whose head is a bright orange molten flame-skull with glowing yellow eye slits; red gauntlets and greaves; small flame licks off the head each frame.
entries.mobIdea: Cinder Revenant — fire-aspect undead for the Cinderrift, melee + ignite

entries.who: Same red-plate silhouette but wearing a spiked GOLD crown and gold pauldron/greave trim; head is a large yellow-gold flame corona. Row 3 shows a dark cloak with gold hem.
entries.mobIdea: Ember King — flame-crowned boss, fire pillars + summon cinder revenants

entries.who: Classic lich: dark blue-grey hooded robe, tall gold crown, glowing red eyes and red mouth in a skull face; bright GOLD skeletal ribcage/arm bones drawn over the robe; gold-gloved hands.
entries.mobIdea: Gilded Lich — caster boss, shadow bolt + raise-dead summons

entries.who: Same robe/crown silhouette as 0,1 but a bone-WHITE skull face (black sockets, no red glow) with gold ribcage and gold bone trim on the dark robe.
entries.mobIdea: Bone Archlich — pale variant, alternate boss skin / lieutenant

entries.who: Hooded dark grey robe with red piping down the front; head is a tan/orange skull crowned by a spray of pale CYAN flame 'hair'; hands hidden in sleeves.
entries.mobIdea: Wisp-Crowned Necromancer — cold caster, spawns marsh wisps

entries.who: Dark grey robe with red/orange piping, no hood; large bare WHITE skull head with big black eye sockets sitting atop the robe. Simplest of the four robed variants.
entries.mobIdea: Crypt Warlock — low-tier caster add for lich encounters

entries.who: Bare bone-WHITE skeleton, naked, no gear, empty hands, big round skull with black sockets and a tooth row.
entries.mobIdea: Restless Bones — weakest trash undead, unarmed claw

entries.who: White skeleton wearing a tattered brown/orange cloth loincloth-wrap; unarmed, hands empty.
entries.mobIdea: Grave Rag Skeleton — trash melee

entries.who: Yellowed/tan aged skeleton (bone stained ochre) with a dark red cloth kilt; unarmed.
entries.mobIdea: Ancient Skeleton — tougher tan-bone trash

entries.who: Tan skeleton wearing a wide-brimmed blue-grey steel kettle helm and a red kilt; unarmed hands.
entries.mobIdea: Skeleton Levy — helmeted unarmed conscript

entries.who: White skeleton with a blue-grey brimmed helm and brown leather harness/straps over the ribs; hands empty.
entries.mobIdea: Skeleton Guard — unarmed but armored, pairs with sword variants

entries.who: Tan skeleton in a crested/domed steel helm and brown leather kilt, HOLDING a pale blue-white straight sword held out diagonally.
entries.mobIdea: Skeleton Soldier — sword melee, the workhorse skeleton

entries.who: Bare-headed tan skeleton with a dark red kilt, HOLDING a pale blue-white sword.
entries.mobIdea: Skeleton Marauder — faster, unarmored swordsman

entries.who: Tan skeleton with a headband/browplate, HOLDING a pale blue-white sword in one hand and a round riveted STEEL SHIELD in the other.
entries.mobIdea: Skeleton Shieldbearer — high armor, low damage, blocks frontal hits

entries.who: The SAME eight skeletons from skeletonarmy.png but in a PRONE / collapsed pose — bones sprawled flat on the ground, skull facing up, arms and legs splayed. Each 3x4 block is 12 near-identical frames (a subtle twitch/settle animation), NOT a 4-direction walk grid. Blocks 0,0-3,0 = the unarmed/helmeted set, 0,1-3,1 = the helmeted/armed set (helm + brown kilt visible, weapons not readable in the prone pose).
entries.mobIdea: Ground-corpse decoration that stands up: play this as the 'dormant' state, then swap to skeletonarmy.png on aggro (a rise-from-the-boneyard ambush)

entries.who: Shambling zombie: sallow yellow-tan skin, mostly bald with rust-red hair tufts at the sides, sunken white eyes, mouth agape; dark maroon/red torn shirt, blue-grey trousers, arms hanging out from the body.
entries.mobIdea: Rotting Villager — slow shambler trash, high hp low speed

entries.who: Zombie with dark blue-grey hair, torn dirty white/pale shirt over a bare chest, dark trousers; head lolling to one side.
entries.mobIdea: Shambling Corpse — plague variant

entries.who: Zombie with a messy mop of blond/orange hair, dark open jacket over a bare torso, maroon trousers.
entries.mobIdea: Risen Farmhand — trash

entries.who: Zombie with dark unkempt hair, bare yellow-green torso (no shirt), grey-blue trousers, pale white shoes.
entries.mobIdea: Bloated Corpse — trash

entries.who: The SAME four zombies as the top row, redrawn with bright red BLOOD/GORE added: head wounds, blood running down the face, chest and arms, splattered clothing. A 'bloodied' variant set, one-for-one with 0,0..3,0.
entries.mobIdea: Bloodied variants — use for elite/enraged zombies or after they land a bite

entries.who: NOT eight characters. This is a zombie RISE-FROM-THE-GROUND sequence spread across the 8 blocks. Top band (cy=0) belongs to the maroon-shirt bald zombie, bottom band (cy=1) to the white-shirt zombie. Block 0,*: a mound of brown dirt clods swelling out of the ground (small ripple -> big heap). Block 1,*: the zombie's head and torso clawing up out of a ring of dirt clods, arms braced. Block 3,*: an open grave hole ringed with dirt with a pale bony hand/forearm reaching straight up out of it.
entries.mobIdea: Graveyard ambush FX: dirt mound -> clawing torso -> hand-from-grave; pairs with mzombies_1 for the walking state

entries.who: VALID 3x4 walk grid inside this sheet: the risen bald zombie, maroon/rust tattered shirt, sallow skin, arms held forward zombie-style. Rows read down / left / right / up (row 3 is the back of the head).
entries.mobIdea: Risen Zombie (post-emergence walk) — the mob body for the graveyard ambush

entries.who: VALID 3x4 walk grid: the risen white-shirt zombie (blood at the chest, pale shoes), same four directions.
entries.mobIdea: Risen Zombie B — second graveyard skin

entries.who: Vampire in dark blue-black spiked plate armor: horned/spiked helm and huge spiked pauldrons, crimson chest trim and belt, pale face with red eyes barely visible under the helm. Row 3 (up) shows a large blood-RED cape.
entries.mobIdea: Blood Knight — armored vampire elite, lifesteal melee

entries.who: Vampire lord: long silver-white hair, chalk-pale face with red eyes, dark navy longcoat with GOLD frogging/buttons, high standing collar with red inner lining, gold-hemmed skirt. Row 3 shows a huge red cape with gold border.
entries.mobIdea: Vampire Lord — caster/melee hybrid boss, blood drain + bat swarm

entries.who: Lesser vampire / thrall: shaggy dark blue-black hair, pale face, plain dark tunic and trousers with a brown belt, pale boots. No cape, no ornament.
entries.mobIdea: Vampire Thrall — fast melee trash that swarms

entries.who: Ornate vampire (reads female): long silver-white hair, red eyes, a tall red/crimson crested collar framing the head, purple and crimson layered robe/gown with gold accents; row 3 shows a purple-and-red cloak.
entries.mobIdea: Crimson Countess — blood magic caster boss

entries.who: The SAME four vampires again with WARM (living/human) skin tone instead of the chalk-pale undead tone — otherwise identical armor/coat/gown/hair. Bottom row = 'not-yet-turned' or 'freshly fed' palette swap.
entries.mobIdea: Use as the human/disguised form of each vampire (NPC in town by day, monster by night)

entries.who: Classic sheet ghost: rounded pale blue-white blob body, two small dark oval eyes and one open dark oval mouth, tattered wavy scalloped hem at the bottom, floating just above a small dark shadow ellipse. No arms, no face detail beyond the three holes.
entries.mobIdea: Wandering Spirit — floating, ignores gravity, phases through blocks, weak magic touch

entries.who: Humanoid entirely wrapped head-to-toe in dirty off-white/grey bandage strips; NO visible face (bandages cross the head, only a dark seam where eyes would be); mitt-like wrapped hands hang out to the sides, loose bandage tails at the wrists and shins; stiff shuffling stance.
entries.mobIdea: Bandaged Mummy — slow, high armor, applies a rot/curse DoT; desert tomb spawner

entries.who: Emaciated hunched ghoul: sickly pale grey-tan skin with visible ribs, wild grey-lavender hair hanging over the face, deep-set glowing yellow eyes, long arms ending in big pale claws, barefoot with clawed toes; wears only a torn rust-red/brown loincloth.
entries.mobIdea: Crypt Ghoul — fast lunging clawer, low hp, spawns in packs

entries.who: Same emaciated hunched ghoul body as mghoulA, recolored: brown/olive hair instead of grey-lavender, torn GREEN loincloth instead of rust-red. Same glowing yellow eyes and clawed hands/feet.
entries.mobIdea: Bog Ghoul — Gloomfen palette swap of the crypt ghoul

entries.who: Hooded reaper: pale sage-green/grey hood and robe with a purple-black rim; a bone-WHITE skull face with two large black eye sockets and a wide toothy grin fills the hood; two blocky grey mitt hands; NO legs — the robe tapers to a rounded base that floats over a shadow. Empty-handed.
entries.mobIdea: Soul Reaper — floating undead caster, drains life; empty-handed 'unarmed' state

entries.who: Identical hooded skull reaper to reaper_1, but WIELDING A SCYTHE: a long rust-brown/orange studded haft crosses the body diagonally from the lower left, with a big curved bone-white blade arcing up over the right shoulder. Wider frame (32 px) to fit the weapon.
entries.mobIdea: Death's Harvester — scythe boss; swap to reaper_1 frames for a disarmed/phase-2 state

entries.who: A large disembodied floating SKULL, bone-white/ivory with warm shading: angular angry eye sockets (black with a faint highlight), a small nose triangle, and only a short row of fang stubs (NO lower jaw). Hovers above a small oval shadow. Full valid 3x4 grid: front, both profiles, and a back view showing the smooth cranium.
entries.mobIdea: Floating Skull — hovering swarm mob, ignores terrain, bite/charge attack

entries.who: Same floating ivory skull as bigskullA but WITH A FULL LOWER JAW — a hinged mandible with a complete row of square teeth hanging below the cranium (it opens/chatters slightly across the frames).
entries.mobIdea: Gnashing Skull — jawed variant, bite DoT / chatter telegraph

entries.who: The same jawless skull ENGULFED IN FIRE: bright orange/yellow flames stream up and back off the cranium (with drifting ember pixels above), the bone itself glows white-hot, sockets are black with orange rims, fang stubs only.
entries.mobIdea: Cinder Skull — Cinderrift flying mob, emissive/glow pass, ignite on contact

entries.who: Flaming skull as bigskullC but WITH THE FULL LOWER JAW (orange-lit mandible and teeth beneath the burning cranium).
entries.mobIdea: Infernal Skull — elite flaming skull, fire-breath cone

entries.who: Scarecrow: a stitched tan burlap-sack head with dark carved eye slits and a jagged grin, tilted to one side; a thin brown wooden-frame body with bright orange/yellow STRAW bursting out at the neck collar, the waist, the cuffs and the ankles; long spindly arms ending in splayed straw claw-fingers; dark purple rag shadows behind the straw. Front-facing only.
entries.mobIdea: Spooky Scarecrow — field/graveyard ambusher that stands motionless until you walk past (only a front pose exists, so give it a static billboard + a rise animation)

warnings: spookyscarecrow_1.png (84x144) does NOT decompose into a 3x4 walk grid at 28x36. Alpha row-scan: content bands at y 22-33 (head/hat crown only), y 39-69 (full body), y 75-107 (full body, slightly different pose), and y 108-143 is COMPLETELY EMPTY. So it is a 3-column x ~3-row front-facing sequence (reads like an emergence/rise: head-only -> full body -> full body), with a blank 4th row. There is no left/right/up view. Treat as a single front-facing sprite (+3-frame idle); it is NOT usable as a 4-direction walker.

mzombies_ground_a_1.png is rendered as char8 but is NOT eight characters. Six of the eight blocks are ground/emergence FX (dirt mound swelling; zombie torso clawing out of a dirt ring; open grave hole with a bony hand reaching up). Only blocks 2,0 and 2,1 are true 3x4 four-direction walk grids (the risen maroon-shirt zombie and the risen white-shirt zombie). Do not map the other six as characters.

skeletonarmy_down.png is rendered as char8 and does decompose into 8 blocks of 3x4, but every frame is a PRONE/collapsed corpse (top-down sprawled bones), not a directional walk. All 12 frames per block are near-identical. Use as a dormant/corpse state paired with skeletonarmy.png, not as a walker.

vamps_8_1.png bottom row (cy=1) is a palette variant, not four new characters: same four vampires with warm living skin instead of chalk-pale. Same for mzombies_1.png bottom row (bloodied versions of the same four zombies).
reaper_blade_1.png uses a WIDER 32x36 frame (96x144 sheet) than reaper_1.png's 26x36 (78x144) — do not reuse the same frame width for both.

No off-grid/garbled halves were found in lich.png, skeletonarmy.png, mzombies_1.png or vamps_8_1.png — all four are clean 8-character sheets with 3x4 walk grids in BOTH halves (unlike the historical wizard.png/elemental.png trap).
bigskullA/B/C/D_1.png are single-character 32x48 sheets with clean 3x4 grids; the pairs are (A jawless bone / B jawed bone) and (C jawless flaming / D jawed flaming).
